top.name: Convergence
top.rules_text: All your spells this turn resolve twice. The second resolution targets the same targets but occurs at end of turn.

channel.name: Convergence (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Second resolution also costs 0 mana

bottom.name: Parallel Timeline
bottom.rules_text: Create 2 branching timeline tiles within range 3. Spells cast while standing on one also resolve on the other. Lasts 3 turns.
